internal_thoughts:

parsed_output.justification: The players' claims are surprisingly consistent. Jacob claims to have started as the Drunk, and Hunter claims to be the Troublemaker who swapped Jacob and Zack. If Jacob (Drunk) swapped the Drunk card into the center and then Hunter (Troublemaker) swapped Jacob with Zack, Zack would end up with the Drunk card. This explains why Zack, as the Insomniac, checked his card at the end of the night and found he was the Drunk. Since Zack, Jacob, and Hunter's roles are all Team Village and Sean claims to be a Villager, it is highly probable that no Werewolf is present among the players.

This explains why Zack, as the Insomniac, checked his card at the end of the night and found he was the Drunk. Since Zack, Jacob, and Hunter's roles are all Team Village and Sean claims to be a Villager, it is highly probable that no Werewolf is present among the players.
